Title: Craig of the Creek
Writer: Matt Burnett, Ben Levin, Shauna McGarry
Actors: Philip Solomon, Michael Croner, Noël Wells
Plot: Craig of the Creek follows a young boy, Craig, and his two friends, Kelsey and JP, as they go on adventures within a world of untamed, kid-dominated wilderness in the creek.
Country: United States, South Korea, Mexico, Spain, Canada
